ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "status" TEXT /* Development status of the country (e.g., Developing, Developed) */,
  "status_binary" INTEGER /* Binary representation of the development status (0 for Developing, 1 for Developed) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the country (e.g., Low, Middle, High) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's capital */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's capital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_income_level FOREIGN KEY ("income_level") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_level_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth (years) */,
  "adult_mortality" REAL /* Adult mortality rate (per 1000 population) */,
  "infant_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of infant deaths per 1000 live births */,
  "alcohol_consumption" REAL /* Alcohol consumption (liters of pure alcohol) */,
  "percent_expenditure" REAL /* Expenditure on health as a percentage of GDP */,
  "hepatitis_b" REAL /* Hepatitis B immunization coverage (percentage) */,
  "measles" INTEGER /* Number of measles cases */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body mass index (BMI) for the population */,
  "under_five_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths of children under five per 1000 live births */,
  "polio" REAL /* Polio immunization coverage (percentage) */,
  "total_expenditure" REAL /* Total expenditure on health per capita (USD) */,
  "diphtheria" INTEGER /* Diphtheria immunization coverage (percentage) */,
  "hiv_aids" REAL /* HIV/AIDS prevalence (percentage) */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (USD) */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population */,
  "thinness_1_19_years" REAL /* Prevalence of thinness among children and adolescents (1-19 years, percentage) */,
  "thinness_5_9_years" REAL /* Prevalence of thinness among children (5-9 years, percentage) */,
  "income_composition_of_resources" REAL /* Income composition of resources (percentage) */,
  "schooling" REAL /* Years of schooling (average) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health indicator record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used for filtering or sorting the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., WHO, UNICEF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source's website */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation for referencing the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_sources" (
  "source_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source mapping */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health indicator record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_sources_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health indicator record being validated */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the validation process */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., manual review, automated checks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validators" (
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validator */,
  "validator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the validator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the validator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the validator (e.g., data scientist, quality assurance) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., epidemiology, statistics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validator_id")
)
